name: Robin T3 PC
comment:
Robin T3 PC™: T3 PC
Building on the celebrated Robe T-Series, the T3 PC™ redefines high-power multispectral wash lighting. Engineered for Long-Throw applications in the world’s largest theatres, it delivers exceptional output, refined light quality, and precise colour control.
Delivering over 32.300 lumens (integrating sphere) from its powerful 1.400W MSL™ (Multi-Spectral-Light) source, the T3 PC™ provides a soft beam via its 250mm front lens and wide ranging 6 - 66° zoom for flawless coverage in expansive venues.

capabilities.comment: BO while PAN TILT moving: ON
BO while PAN TILT moving: OFF
Quiet mode  Fans ON at blackout
Quiet mode  Fans OFF at blackout
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour mix)
Crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix
Frost 1 Rot- Fast to slow CW
Frost 1 Rot- Slow to fast CCW
Frost 2 Rot- Fast to slow CW
Frost 2 Rot- Slow to fast CCW
Frost 1+2 Rot - Fast to slow CW
Frost 1+2 Rot - Slow to fast CCW
Frost 1-2 Rot - Fast to slow CW
Frost 1-2 Rot - Slow to fast CCW
Random strobe from slow to fast
